description: Project-scoped Riela workflow to review today's memory, session SQLite, chat/example, and verification changes without mutating git state.

prompts.rielaPromptTemplate: Review today's local changes, verify the key invariants, and summarize whether more implementation work is required.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise JSON only. Preserve unrelated dirty worktree changes. Do not commit or push.

steps.description: Run deterministic review checks for today's changed memory and session persistence behavior.
Run targeted build, tests, lint probe, and SQLite smoke verification.
